about.label: About Us
about.title: The Cathedral Philosophy
about.paragraph1: Founded with the vision of elevating the standards of luxury living in Madrid, Cathedral Group has become a benchmark of sophistication and technical precision.
about.paragraph2: We don't just design spaces; we orchestrate sensory experiences where light, material and proportion converge to create environments of serenity and absolute distinction.

excellence.label: Excellence and Rigour
excellence.text1: We redefine the concept of luxury through
excellence.text2: , sophisticated interior design and meticulously design-oriented construction.
excellence.text3: Located in the heart of Madrid, our studio blends architectural heritage with contemporary trends to create homes that are true works of art.
